title: Pasabahce Glass Latte Coffee Mug Set, Turkish Tea Glasses for Hot Beverages, Set of 2, 12.7 oz
features: SPECIAL DESIGN GLASSES WITH HANDLE: Pasabahce glass mug set with handle is specially designed for latte, coffee or any kind of your favorite hot beverages.
BEST QUALITY TURKISH PRODUCT: Latte coffee glasses are made of high-quality material. They feature durable and heat resistant, and lightweight.

EASY TO CLEAN-HEALTHY PRODUCT: Made in Turkey glass material, lead free, BPA free. Easy to clean and help preserve your products. Glass is made from all-natural, 100% recyclable, and Environment friendly.
SET OF 2 – PERFECT GIFT: Measures 4.5 inch height with 12.7 ounce (385 cc) capacity. Made of high quality European glass, firm and durable. Also excellent gift for any occasion.
NO RISK TO PURCHASE No worry to purchase our product. Just feel free to contact us whatever the reason is. Your satisfaction is our encouragement to chase high-quality products.
description: Pasabahce Glass Latte Coffee Cups with Handle is ideal for use with a latte, coffee, tea, herbal tea, and other hot and cold beverages. 2 Pcs glass mug with handle set is perfectly designed with a comfortable grip. This exclusive design makes a set of 2 glass cups unique. Ideal for use at your dining table to finish off elegant dinner parties. This large capacity coffee latte glass (12.7 ounces) would make a stylish and practical addition to your kitchen and dining room. With a clear and simple design and a handle for your safety and convenience, our latte glass is both easy to use and guaranteed to blend perfectly with your table arrangements and existing crockery. Made from glass and suitable for dishwashing, our latte glass is suitable for everyday use as well as more formal dinner parties. However, we recommend you hand wash the glasses. Glass cups are made of high-quality heat resistant clear glass. They feature lightweight and durable. You can use these durable glass cups for a long time. Glass plates lead to health benefits because glass is good for your food. Every element that glass is made of is natural and always has been. The results from a recent study are in, and show that consumers across the board agree that glass is a safe material. Glass is made from all-natural, sustainable raw materials, is 100% recyclable, and can be recycled endlessly with no loss in quality or purity. Also an excellent gift for any occasion.
